short_blurb: Expert roofing services for San Gabriel homes, missions, and commercial buildings.
local_note: San Gabriel's older neighborhoods include Craftsman bungalows, Spanish Colonial Revival homes, and post-war ranches — all with different roofing needs. We're experienced matching older architectural profiles and working carefully around mature landscaping and historically sensitive properties. We also do a lot of commercial flat-roofing on the retail and light commercial buildings along San Gabriel Blvd.

faqs.q: Can you work carefully around my mature trees and landscaping in San Gabriel?
faqs.a: Yes. We use plywood and tarps to protect landscaping during teardown, and our dumpster placement is coordinated to minimize yard impact. We do a thorough cleanup including magnet sweep for nails before we leave.
